title: To designate the U.S. National Poultry Research Center of the Department of Agriculture located in Athens, Georgia, as the "Abit Massey Poultry Research Center".
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Livestock, Dairy, and Poultry.
crs_summary: This bill designates the Department of Agriculture U.S. National Poultry Research Center in Athens, Georgia, as the Abit Massey Poultry Research Center.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Livestock, Dairy, and Poultry.
